text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of tryouts is finally here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash is getting warmed up to run 1,600 meters. Her condition
seems fine, but something has her on edge...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her eyes, I spot a couple who don't quite blend in with the
crowd. The "I mean business" look on their faces reminds me of Eishin
Flash.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Toi, toi, toi.

text_block_list.name: School Staff A
text_block_list.text: It's time! All runners for the 1,600-meter race, please gather round!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Auf geht's!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her parents watching over her, Eishin Flash starts in the tryout race.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah... Trainer. You came to watch.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Can't blame her for feeling down. She ended up finishing in sixth. But
still...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No, my performance was hardly satisfactory. The results say it all.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...We really do perceive things differently, don't we? Actually, I...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'd... like to ask a favor of you. I'm about to meet up with my parents.
Would you come with me?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Given my results, I'm not confident I'll be able to keep calm in
front of them. But...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You told me before that my feelings would get across. So I, um...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Eishin Flash sees her parents waiting for her, she stops in her
tracks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems hesitant, so I nod as if to urge her forward. Having found
her determination, she takes a step forward.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Father, Mother. It's good to see you. Thank you for upholding your end of our promise and coming to watch me race.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: But I couldn't uphold mine. I wanted to show you that your daughter had grown up correctly, but I...

text_block_list.name: Flash's Mother
text_block_list.text: Flash, you did well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Yes, your results were not perfect, but your effort was evident. I remember how you used to get overly tense, but it's apparent you've learned to control it.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: You've put in countless hours of hard work for our sake, didn't you? Just like we taught you. We are proud to call you our daughter.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Thank you for this gift, our dear Schatzi.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (It's coming back to me now. That holiday eve, Father said to me...)

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Flash, our dear Schatzi, you must never forget this—one reason we do not tolerate error is, of course, to ensure quality.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: But there is another, more important reason. We do what we do properly, and with care, for the sake of bringing happiness to another.

text_block_list.name: Young Flash
text_block_list.text: To bring... happiness?

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: If not for this, anyone with the recipe could do our job. The meaning of our work comes from the care and love we put into it.

text_block_list.name: Young Flash
text_block_list.text: But those things don't add any flavor. Your recipes don't say to include them either...

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Heh... Fair enough. You don't need to understand the difference now. But you will one day, when you are capable of work you are proud of.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(It was never just about winning according to plan. Everything I put
into improving for their sake has led to the happiness we share now.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(I was so terrified of throwing everything off course, but I never
needed to be. There was something more important all along.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Father, Mother—thank you. I... I tried my best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The expression on her face is looking brighter as she introduces me to
her parents afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
Japanese, okay. I learned with her, so I know a little. Flash, who is
this?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: This is my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Or rather, the person I'd like to be my trainer. Nothing's final yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words catch me off guard, but I already know my answer. My mind
was made up the moment I first laid eyes on her.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list: I am her trainer. Now it's final.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
I see... Please, take good care of my daughter. Flash, work hard
together.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, Father!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The schedule I made was perfect, and I wasn't wrong to follow it.
But...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have what it took to carry it out. I was naive and pushed
myself too far.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems I really am clueless... I can draw a line for myself to follow,
but once I step off, I don't know how to get back on.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But I now understand how important it is to have someone with a
different perspective who can determine where that line is going.
choice_data_list:
And that's why you chose me to be your
trainer?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes... And why did you agree?
choice_data_list:
I've been interested since the first time I saw
you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait, you have been?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I saw the pure determination in her eyes, the beauty of her
running... I thought to myself how I want to take her as far as she can
go, and then farther still.
choice_data_list: I'm sure this was all part of your plan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, this can't have been planned. At least, it was never part of any of
my plans.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And so, a correction is needed. From this point forward, I must race to
my utmost and improve myself as a runner.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll work you into my schedule, and together, we'll accomplish this
goal and do work we can be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins our steady—and well-planned—path to the Twinkle
Series.
